name: Open-Generative-AI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Anil-matcha /

      Open-Generative-AI  

    
      Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
summary: 该项目是一个开源的AI图像与视频生成工作室，集成了200多种模型（如Flux、Midjourney等），无内容过滤且支持自托管，值得关注因为它提供了免费、无限制的AI创作替代方案。

name: supertonic
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        supertone-inc /

      supertonic  

    
      Lightning-Fast, On-Device, Multilingual TTS — running natively via ONNX.
summary: Supertonic 是一个基于 ONNX 原生运行、支持多语言的超快速设备端文本转语音（TTS）项目，因其极低延迟和离线能力而值得关注。

name: openhuman
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        tinyhumansai /

      openhuman  

    
      Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
summary: OpenHuman 是一个用 Rust 构建的个人AI超级智能助手，主打隐私、简洁和强大，值得关注因为它将AI能力完全本地化，兼顾高性能与数据安全。

name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: CodeGraph 是一个为 Claude Code 预建索引的代码知识图谱工具，能大幅减少 token 消耗和工具调用次数，且完全本地运行，值得关注因为它显著提升了 AI 编码助手的效率与成本效益。

name: bun
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        oven-sh /

      bun  

    
      Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
summary: Bun 是一个用 Rust 编写的极速 JavaScript 运行时，集成了打包器、测试运行器和包管理器于一体，因其惊人的性能和“全家桶”式设计而备受关注。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需任何摄像头，值得关注因为它开创了无隐私风险的无线感知新范式。

name: scientific-agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        K-Dense-AI /

      scientific-agent-skills  

    
      A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
summary: 该项目提供了一套即用型智能体技能，涵盖科研、工程、金融和写作等领域，值得关注是因为它大幅降低了构建专业AI代理的门槛。

name: obra
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        obra /

      superpowers  

    
      An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: 该项目是一个基于智能体技能的框架与软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。值得关注的是它提供了一套可实际落地的结构化开发流程，有望简化复杂软件系统的构建与管理。
